records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ah hah hah. Well, there was a lot going on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even with a Category 4 C.O. and a Moderator appearing simultaneously, we kept the damage to a minimum.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But even with a Category 4 C.O. and a Moderator appearing simultaneously, we kept the damage to a minimum.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No casualties, so didn't we do a pretty good job?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No casualties, so didn't we do a pretty good job?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No casualties, so didn't we do a pretty good job?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what everyone's thinking, right...? Ah hah hah...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what everyone's thinking, right...? Ah hah hah...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what everyone's thinking, right...? Ah hah hah...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Errgh!! No, everything's not okay!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Errgh!! No, everything's not okay!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Errgh!! No, everything's not okay!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You returned covered in blood, then asked me to analyze the Moderator's remains!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You returned covered in blood, then asked me to analyze the Moderator's remains!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You returned covered in blood, then asked me to analyze the Moderator's remains!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Why are you trying to shame me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Why are you trying to shame me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Why are you trying to shame me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, it wasn't that bad! I just got a tiny scratch, that's all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, it wasn't that bad! I just got a tiny scratch, that's all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, it wasn't that bad! I just got a tiny scratch, that's all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why do you keep ignoring the Headquarters' orders, and acting on your own?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And why do you keep ignoring the Headquarters' orders, and acting on your own?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And why do you keep ignoring the Headquarters' orders, and acting on your own?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you notice how everyone was on edge because of the upcoming huge operation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you notice how everyone was on edge because of the upcoming huge operation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you notice how everyone was on edge because of the upcoming huge operation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does it matter if the operation is big or small?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What does it matter if the operation is big or small?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What does it matter if the operation is big or small?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Comrades' lives were on the line. They could've died, you know!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Comrades' lives were on the line. They could've died, you know!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Comrades' lives were on the line. They could've died, you know!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alice, Justine is saying those things because she was worried about you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alice, Justine is saying those things because she was worried about you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alice, Justine is saying those things because she was worried about you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I told you once before. I'm not going to allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I told you once before. I'm not going to allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I told you once before. I'm not going to allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what my Counter ability and my position as Commander of this division is for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what my Counter ability and my position as Commander of this division is for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what my Counter ability and my position as Commander of this division is for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what anyone says, as long as I'm the Commander, I'll never let my determination go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what anyone says, as long as I'm the Commander, I'll never let my determination go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what anyone says, as long as I'm the Commander, I'll never let my determination go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...*Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...*Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...*Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, okay. I understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, okay. I understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, okay. I understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that is what you've decided as our leader, then we'll all have to respect it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that is what you've decided as our leader, then we'll all have to respect it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that is what you've decided as our leader, then we'll all have to respect it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Why does that sound somewhat sarcastic?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Why does that sound somewhat sarcastic?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Why does that sound somewhat sarcastic?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I also think there's something strange about it, like Alice said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I also think there's something strange about it, like Alice said.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, I also think there's something strange about it, like Alice said.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never heard of a data-corrupted Moderator specifically targeting something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never heard of a data-corrupted Moderator specifically targeting something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never heard of a data-corrupted Moderator specifically targeting something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And also that unidentified humanoid-type that appeared along with the Moderator in the operation zone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And also that unidentified humanoid-type that appeared along with the Moderator in the operation zone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And also that unidentified humanoid-type that appeared along with the Moderator in the operation zone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Something just doesn't add up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Something just doesn't add up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Something just doesn't add up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right? My gut is never wrong!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right? My gut is never wrong!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right? My gut is never wrong!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think, Justine?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think, Justine?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think, Justine?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you found out anything as a former member of the Weapon Development Bureau?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you found out anything as a former member of the Weapon Development Bureau?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you found out anything as a former member of the Weapon Development Bureau?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Of course!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Of course!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Of course!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've memorized the development history of the destroyed Moderator project just for today!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've memorized the development history of the destroyed Moderator project just for today!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've memorized the development history of the destroyed Moderator project just for today!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure it'll help you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure it'll help you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure it'll help you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Moderator, the annihilator designed for defeating Category 4 C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moderator, the annihilator designed for defeating Category 4 C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Moderator, the annihilator designed for defeating Category 4 C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The biggest feature of it is its capability for a dimension jump by itself, much like a dimensional ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The biggest feature of it is its capability for a dimension jump by itself, much like a dimensional ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The biggest feature of it is its capability for a dimension jump by itself, much like a dimensional ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, Moderators use an Eternium Drive with nearly identical specifications to those of a dimensional ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, Moderators use an Eternium Drive with nearly identical specifications to those of a dimensional ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, Moderators use an Eternium Drive with nearly identical specifications to those of a dimensional ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It probably gets a continuous supply of Eternium in the Counterside,
records.m_Talk_DEU: It probably gets a continuous supply of Eternium in the Counterside,
records.m_Talk_FRA: It probably gets a continuous supply of Eternium in the Counterside,

records.m_Talk_ENG: and was built as a weapon that can perform operations in any situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: and was built as a weapon that can perform operations in any situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: and was built as a weapon that can perform operations in any situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, green pea. No one here is curious about the beetle's developmental history other than you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, green pea. No one here is curious about the beetle's developmental history other than you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, green pea. No one here is curious about the beetle's developmental history other than you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just get to the point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just get to the point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just get to the point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eeeep...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eeeep...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eeeep...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What an impatient Commander we've got!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What an impatient Commander we've got!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What an impatient Commander we've got!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The conclusion is simple!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The conclusion is simple!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The conclusion is simple!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm telling you all this because if this conclusion is right, it'll make the situation even more complicated!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm telling you all this because if this conclusion is right, it'll make the situation even more complicated!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm telling you all this because if this conclusion is right, it'll make the situation even more complicated!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why are you getting all serious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why are you getting all serious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why are you getting all serious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a crucial matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a crucial matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a crucial matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because the Moderator you destroyed, never used it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because the Moderator you destroyed, never used it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because the Moderator you destroyed, never used it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean... its <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean... its <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean... its <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about? But isn't Eternium Drive the Administration's standard power source?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about? But isn't Eternium Drive the Administration's standard power source?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about? But isn't Eternium Drive the Administration's standard power source?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Moderator was developed as a weapon that could perform operations in any situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Moderator was developed as a weapon that could perform operations in any situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Moderator was developed as a weapon that could perform operations in any situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So the Weapon Development Bureau attempted to use Corruption rays as its source of power rather than Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So the Weapon Development Bureau attempted to use Corruption rays as its source of power rather than Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So the Weapon Development Bureau attempted to use Corruption rays as its source of power rather than Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This way, it can easily operate even in situations where the supply of Eternium isn't readily available.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This way, it can easily operate even in situations where the supply of Eternium isn't readily available.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This way, it can easily operate even in situations where the supply of Eternium isn't readily available.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But once it was found that the Moderator was vulnerable to data corruption, the project was shelved.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But once it was found that the Moderator was vulnerable to data corruption, the project was shelved.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But once it was found that the Moderator was vulnerable to data corruption, the project was shelved.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the next-generation power source project remained only on paper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the next-generation power source project remained only on paper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the next-generation power source project remained only on paper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That project's name was... <color=#ffd34c>Avesta Drive</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That project's name was... <color=#ffd34c>Avesta Drive</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That project's name was... <color=#ffd34c>Avesta Drive</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avesta Drive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Avesta Drive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Avesta Drive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, so it uses Corruption rays as a source of power? How's that even possible...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, so it uses Corruption rays as a source of power? How's that even possible...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, so it uses Corruption rays as a source of power? How's that even possible...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's impossible! It's dangerous! An extreme challenge!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's impossible! It's dangerous! An extreme challenge!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's impossible! It's dangerous! An extreme challenge!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what does it all mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what does it all mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what does it all mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Moderator that attacked the Control Command wasn't made by the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Moderator that attacked the Control Command wasn't made by the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Moderator that attacked the Control Command wasn't made by the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. In other words, this was a camouflage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. In other words, this was a camouflage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. In other words, this was a camouflage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To pull off a trick like this, one will need to be equal to or even surpass the Administration's level of technology!
records.m_Talk_DEU: To pull off a trick like this, one will need to be equal to or even surpass the Administration's level of technology!
records.m_Talk_FRA: To pull off a trick like this, one will need to be equal to or even surpass the Administration's level of technology!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surpass the Administration?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surpass the Administration?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surpass the Administration?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's talking about technology more advanced than the current Administration's.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's talking about technology more advanced than the current Administration's.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's talking about technology more advanced than the current Administration's.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe this is a new hostile force that we've never encountered before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe this is a new hostile force that we've never encountered before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe this is a new hostile force that we've never encountered before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll relay this information about the Moderator to the Headquarters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll relay this information about the Moderator to the Headquarters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll relay this information about the Moderator to the Headquarters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was all that I could obtain from its remains.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was all that I could obtain from its remains.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was all that I could obtain from its remains.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll need an unharmed enemy power engine if you want more reliable intel and technical analysis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll need an unharmed enemy power engine if you want more reliable intel and technical analysis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll need an unharmed enemy power engine if you want more reliable intel and technical analysis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, it's settled!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, it's settled!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, it's settled!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha's next search target has been decided!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha's next search target has been decided!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha's next search target has been decided!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll search for a hostile disguised as a Moderator, and secure its engine!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll search for a hostile disguised as a Moderator, and secure its engine!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll search for a hostile disguised as a Moderator, and secure its engine!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eeeep...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eeeep...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eeeep...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What an impatient Commander we've got!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What an impatient Commander we've got!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What an impatient Commander we've got!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The conclusion is simple!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The conclusion is simple!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The conclusion is simple!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm telling you all this because if this conclusion is right, it'll make the situation even more complicated!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm telling you all this because if this conclusion is right, it'll make the situation even more complicated!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm telling you all this because if this conclusion is right, it'll make the situation even more complicated!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why are you getting all serious?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why are you getting all serious?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why are you getting all serious?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is a crucial matter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is a crucial matter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a crucial matter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because the Moderator you destroyed, never used it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because the Moderator you destroyed, never used it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because the Moderator you destroyed, never used it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I mean... its <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I mean... its <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I mean... its <color=#ffd34c>Eternium Drive</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about? But isn't Eternium Drive the Administration's standard power source?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about? But isn't Eternium Drive the Administration's standard power source?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about? But isn't Eternium Drive the Administration's standard power source?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Moderator was developed as a weapon that could perform operations in any situation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Moderator was developed as a weapon that could perform operations in any situation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Moderator was developed as a weapon that could perform operations in any situation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So the Weapon Development Bureau attempted to use Corruption rays as its source of power rather than Eternium.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So the Weapon Development Bureau attempted to use Corruption rays as its source of power rather than Eternium.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So the Weapon Development Bureau attempted to use Corruption rays as its source of power rather than Eternium.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This way, it can easily operate even in situations where the supply of Eternium isn't readily available.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This way, it can easily operate even in situations where the supply of Eternium isn't readily available.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This way, it can easily operate even in situations where the supply of Eternium isn't readily available.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But once it was found that the Moderator was vulnerable to data corruption, the project was shelved.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But once it was found that the Moderator was vulnerable to data corruption, the project was shelved.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But once it was found that the Moderator was vulnerable to data corruption, the project was shelved.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the next-generation power source project remained only on paper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the next-generation power source project remained only on paper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the next-generation power source project remained only on paper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That project's name was... <color=#ffd34c>Avesta Drive</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That project's name was... <color=#ffd34c>Avesta Drive</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That project's name was... <color=#ffd34c>Avesta Drive</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Avesta Drive?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Avesta Drive?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Avesta Drive?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, so it uses Corruption rays as a source of power? How's that even possible...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, so it uses Corruption rays as a source of power? How's that even possible...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, so it uses Corruption rays as a source of power? How's that even possible...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's impossible! It's dangerous! An extreme challenge!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's impossible! It's dangerous! An extreme challenge!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's impossible! It's dangerous! An extreme challenge!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So what does it all mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So what does it all mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So what does it all mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Moderator that attacked the Control Command wasn't made by the Administration?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Moderator that attacked the Control Command wasn't made by the Administration?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Moderator that attacked the Control Command wasn't made by the Administration?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. In other words, this was a camouflage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. In other words, this was a camouflage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. In other words, this was a camouflage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To pull off a trick like this, one will need to be equal to or even surpass the Administration's level of technology!
root.m_Talk_DEU: To pull off a trick like this, one will need to be equal to or even surpass the Administration's level of technology!
root.m_Talk_FRA: To pull off a trick like this, one will need to be equal to or even surpass the Administration's level of technology!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Surpass the Administration?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Surpass the Administration?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Surpass the Administration?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's talking about technology more advanced than the current Administration's.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's talking about technology more advanced than the current Administration's.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's talking about technology more advanced than the current Administration's.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe this is a new hostile force that we've never encountered before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe this is a new hostile force that we've never encountered before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe this is a new hostile force that we've never encountered before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll relay this information about the Moderator to the Headquarters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll relay this information about the Moderator to the Headquarters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll relay this information about the Moderator to the Headquarters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was all that I could obtain from its remains.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was all that I could obtain from its remains.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was all that I could obtain from its remains.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll need an unharmed enemy power engine if you want more reliable intel and technical analysis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll need an unharmed enemy power engine if you want more reliable intel and technical analysis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll need an unharmed enemy power engine if you want more reliable intel and technical analysis.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, it's settled!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, it's settled!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, it's settled!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha's next search target has been decided!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha's next search target has been decided!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha's next search target has been decided!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll search for a hostile disguised as a Moderator, and secure its engine!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll search for a hostile disguised as a Moderator, and secure its engine!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll search for a hostile disguised as a Moderator, and secure its engine!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll call for a briefing once the details of this operation are fixed!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll call for a briefing once the details of this operation are fixed!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll call for a briefing once the details of this operation are fixed!
